title: oxdoc structured text JSON output
description: Schema for `oxdoc extract text --format structured-json` output in oxdoc schema version 1.

file.description: File name derived from the provided input path.

blocks.description: Ordered non-empty text blocks with source part metadata.

part_type.description: Logical source kind, such as main, header, footer, footnotes, endnotes, comments, slide, or notes.

part_path.description: OOXML package part path that produced this text block.

text.description: Extracted text for this source block.
